---
title: "Osteoperosis"
---
# My Markdown page
## Section 1
## Smaller section
---

**DO NOT** put things in bold or *ITALICS*

* Bullet 1
* [ ]

 1. numbered point 1

> > help to use code 

<https://www.nihr.ac.uk/funding-programmes/research-for-patient-benefit>
[RFPB] (https://www.nihr.ac.uk/funding-programmes/research-for-patient-benefit)

[RFPB](https://www.nihr.ac.uk/funding-programmes/research-for-patient-benefit)

---

|author|Year|Title|
|-|-|-|
|Monks|2026|Quarto|

::: {.callout-tip title="Helpful hint"} please look at the quarto template to help you 
:::
